scripts.build: npm run --silent build:tw && npm run --silent build:css && npm run --silent build:js && npm run --silent build:text && npm run --silent build:version
scripts.build:js: node core/cli/copy-file.mjs ./node_modules/medium-editor/dist/js/medium-editor.min.js ext/static/medium-editor.min.js && esbuild js/index.jsx --bundle --minify --outfile=ext/static/app.js && npm run --silent build:version
scripts.build:css: node core/cli/copy-file.mjs ./node_modules/medium-editor/dist/css/medium-editor.min.css ./css/medium-editor.min.css && esbuild css/index.css --bundle --minify --external:img/* --external:font/* --outfile=ext/static/app.css && npm run --silent build:version
scripts.up: docker compose -f docker/dev/docker-compose.yml build --pull nimbly && docker compose -f docker/dev/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f docker/dev/docker-compose.yml up -d nimbly
